tmc_interrupt_func Union Reference
[User-space Interrupt Installation Routines (tmc/interrupt.h)]

tmc_interrupt_func_t is the user-space C callback function which can have two different types at the same time. More...


Data Fields

void(* func_no_arg )(void)
 Use this type if interrupt context information is not helpful.
void(* func_two_args )(int intr_num, struct sigcontext *context)
 Use this type if you want interrupt context information.

Detailed Description

tmc_interrupt_func_t is the user-space C callback function which can have two different types at the same time.

func_no_arg has no input argument but void as the return value. func_two_args has void as its return value but two input arguments.

Parameters:
intr_num Interrupt vector number being received.
context Pointer to the sigcontext structure. NOTE that only r0-r29, sp, lr and pc inside sigcontext are saved properly to save time, since the other fields are either zero all the time or not commonly used.

Field Documentation

void(* tmc_interrupt_func::func_no_arg)(void)

Use this type if interrupt context information is not helpful.

void(* tmc_interrupt_func::func_two_args)(int intr_num, struct sigcontext *context)

Use this type if you want interrupt context information.
